document:
Cinder Peak Labs Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 35 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@cinderpeak.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 1 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: In days, how long is the refund window?
